summary: Iteration 12: Frontend-only testing of Services Multi-Select feature. All 9 requested features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Services column appears in Site Sizing table header between Role and Platform columns
Services column header has info tooltip: 'Co-located services that can run on the same host. Each service adds performance overhead.'
Services button in each row shows 'None' by default with settings icon
Clicking Services button opens a popover with 'Co-located Services' title
Popover contains 5 service checkboxes: NTP, DFP, TFTP, FTP, HTTP
Each service shows its performance overhead percentage: NTP (no %), DFP +5%, TFTP +2%, FTP +2%, HTTP +3%
Selecting services updates the services display in the button (e.g., 'NTP, DFP')
Token calculation increases based on total service overhead: selecting DFP adds 5% to tokens (880 → 924)
Total overhead is shown at bottom of popover when services are selected (e.g., 'Total overhead: +5%')
Total Tokens summary card updates correctly (4,400 → 4,444 when DFP selected on first row)
CSV export button present with data-testid='export-csv'
YAML export button present with data-testid='export-yaml'
Code review confirms CSV export includes 'Services' column with services joined by semicolon
Code review confirms YAML export includes 'services' array for each site
critical_code_review_comments: TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx: ADDITIONAL_SERVICES constant correctly defines 5 services with impact percentages (lines 81-87)
TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx: getServiceImpact() function correctly calculates total overhead (lines 90-95)
TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx: toggleService() function correctly handles service selection/deselection (lines 373-383)
TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx: Services column popover UI well-implemented with checkboxes and overhead display (lines 661-702)
TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx: Token calculation correctly applies service impact: Math.ceil(baseTokens * (1 + serviceImpact / 100)) (lines 211-212, 255-256)
TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx: CSV export includes Services column (line 387-390)
TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx: YAML export includes services array (line 420)
seed_data_creation: Used existing 'Test Customer Frontend' with 4 DCs and 1 Site
context_for_next_testing_agent: Services Multi-Select feature fully verified. Services column visible in Site Sizing table with info tooltip. Popover shows 5 services (NTP 0%, DFP +5%, TFTP +2%, FTP +2%, HTTP +3%). Token calculations update correctly based on service overhead. CSV and YAML exports include services data.

services_column.location: Between Role and Platform columns in Site Sizing table
services_column.header_tooltip: Co-located services that can run on the same host. Each service adds performance overhead.

services_popover.title: Co-located Services
services_popover.description: Select additional services running on this host. Each adds performance overhead.
services_popover.total_overhead_display: Shows at bottom when services selected (e.g., 'Total overhead: +5%')

token_calculation.total_update: 4,400 → 4,444 when DFP selected on first row

exports.csv: Services column included with services joined by semicolon (e.g., 'NTP;DFP')
exports.yaml: services array included for each site (e.g., services: [NTP, DFP])

screenshots: .screenshots/03_sizing_tab.png - Site Sizing table with Services column visible
.screenshots/04_services_popover.png - Services popover with 5 checkboxes and overhead percentages
.screenshots/06_tokens_after_dfp.png - Tokens updated to 924 after DFP selection
.screenshots/09_final_state.png - Final state showing NTP, DFP in Services column
